included_moves.target_path: engine/ runtime/ contracts/protocol/ contracts/capability/ tools/ tests/

deferred_items: runtime/source semantics require ownership review and build/product proof gate
blocked_items: cannot move deterministic substrate or protocol surfaces in a docs-only cleanup gate

shims.retirement_condition: all runtime/import callers migrated and product proof passes

rollback: Reverse runtime/source moves/imports/references/shims and restore core/control/net exceptions.
apply_strategy: Defer until runtime ownership and build/product proof scope are accepted.
